label: Stat part (glow)
description: Scales the stat based on the ambient light level at the pawn's tile.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

pawnOnly.label: Pawn only
pawnOnly.description: If true, this part only applies when the stat request is for a pawn.

humanlikeOnly.label: Humanlike only
humanlikeOnly.description: If true, this part only applies to humanlike pawns.

factorFromGlowCurve.label: Factor from glow curve
factorFromGlowCurve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping light level (0–1) to the stat factor.

ignoreIfPrefersDarkness.label: Ignore if prefers darkness
ignoreIfPrefersDarkness.description: If true, the glow factor is ignored for pawns that prefer darkness.

ignoreIfIncapableOfSight.label: Ignore if incapable of sight
ignoreIfIncapableOfSight.description: If true, the glow factor is ignored for pawns that cannot see.
